title: Fix add-item screen: decimal inputs, Switch, validation, UI polish
acceptance_criteria: Percentage inputs use controlled string state — typing '33.' does not reset to '33'
Percentage value is only parsed to number on blur, not on every keystroke
Custom toggle replaced with Switch from ~/components/ui/switch
Split Evenly toggle uses switchRow pattern (icon + label + Switch)
Percentage total indicator bar shown below participant list with color coding (green=100%, yellow=under, red=over)
Inline amount preview per participant shows dollar amount (price * qty * pct / 100)
Section labels added: Item Details, Split Configuration, Participants (12px, 600 weight)
Footer: Cancel (outline) + Save (default) matching budget-modify pattern
Save disabled when name is empty
